description_long: This house features a two-story rectangular main structure with a flat roof and a smaller attached section with a partially open, pergola-style roof. The exterior walls are finished in a light stone or brick texture, punctuated by evenly spaced arched windows on both levels. The rooftop includes a fenced terrace area with visible seating and a person, suggesting recreational use. The main entryway is accessed by a wide staircase leading up to a central landing, flanked by arched doorways. The attached section has a glass or transparent roof supported by a wooden frame, likely serving as a sunroom or greenhouse. The overall design blends utilitarian and classical elements, with a focus on symmetry and outdoor living spaces.
description: A two-story stone or brick house with a flat roof, arched windows, a rooftop terrace, and an attached sunroom with a pergola-style roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, central entry, and attached sunroom with a transparent roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, symmetrical window rows, and the rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the wide staircase, central landing, and arched doorways.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the attached sunroom and the flat expanse of the main roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wide staircase leading to a raised landing with arched doorways, no porch or columns, simple classical detailing
